title: Damku's Weaponry
description: A simple mod that adds weapons with unique abilites to the game.
body:
### **Hey! This mod is discontinued, sadly. I'll be off to making better mods than this now :)**
---

A very, very lightwieght mod that adds weapons with their own unique abilites to the game.

Most weapons are homages (or parodies) of certain characters in media; it wouldn't be too hard to notice.

# Things that aren't in-game

This section is about stuff that its functions are not explained in-game.

### Destiny Elucidation

"Destiny Elucidation" is an weapon enchantment (Level I ~ V).
When you hit an entity, it has 1/2/3/4/5% to apply the Skandha's Curse effect to it for 5 seconds.

### Sticky Feet

"Sticky Feet" is an effect that disables jumping entirely.
Levitation still works unless your feet are on the ground. This means if you fall down a mountain with sticky feet and levitation, you will still levitate mid-air.
You are also still able to go up gaps less than a block. (e.g. slabs, stairs)

### Soul Fire Charge

At first, the soul fire charge might just look like an ingredient for the overcharged capacitor (which is an ingredient for the Galaxy Nova).
That is a purpose that it serves, there is one more function. Just like a fire charge, you can use it on a surface to light it on fire.
Instead lighting a single block like a normal fire charge, you can put fire like a + shape, going 2 blocks from the origin point all four directions.
